loop1.title: Power Quality
loop1.note: Showing total I-THD as proxy for V-THD, H5, and H7 because dedicated voltage-harmonic and individual-order columns are not measured by this meter; Flicker and Crest Factor are not measured.

loop1.title: Distortion & Harmonic Profile
loop1.note: Showing current THD evolution (I-THD) — voltage THD and specific harmonic orders (H5/H7) are not measured by this UPS meter.

loop1.title: Load Impact & Transformer Stress
loop1.note: Showing Displacement PF, True PF, and PF Gap — K-factor and Phase Angle are not measured for this asset.
